library: בית המדרש לרבנים · בית המדרש לרבנים
description: List of entries in Arabic script that possibly designate accounts. Based on the remnants of thread used in binding, this fragment is from a larger notebook or ledger. A number of shorthand terms are in use, for example the single ligature that begins each entry may itself be a common financial term that was quickly written and thus lacks any dotting. Another term, possibly an abbreviation, that appears in some entries is "صو" which could also be read as "حو". MCD.
description_he: רשימת רשומות בכתב ערבי, ככל הנראה חשבונות. מקטעי חוטים השמורים ניכר שהדף הוא חלק ממחברת או פנקס גדול יותר. מספר קיצורים בשימוש.
